channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Did You Know? Alan Greenspan and Ayn Rand Were Close Friends
item.description: One of the most significant intellectual relationships in former Fed chair Alan Greenspan's life was with novelist Ayn Rand.

item.title: Supreme Court Allows Ruling That Strikes Down Key Voting Rights Tool in 7 States
item.description: The Supreme Court upheld a decision that removes a crucial mechanism for enforcing Voting Rights Act protections for disabled and minority voters.

item.title: Key facts about the gut microbiome and how to maintain its health
item.description: Wellness influencers often discuss repairing a damaged gut microbiome, while marketers promote tests and supplements for gut health. Here is what...

item.title: Messi sets new all-time World Cup scoring record with historic performance
item.description: Messi scored a record 17th World Cup goal in Argentina's match against Austria, then added another to become the all-time leading scorer.
